title: Enhanced And Light Weight Yolov8 Based Model For Accurate Rice Pest Detection
desc: To detect rice pests using a lightweight YOLOv8 model. Aims for real-time, field-ready pest identification.

title: Fruit Monitoring and Harvest Date Prediction Using On-Tree Automatic Image Tracking
desc: To monitor on-tree fruit growth using automatic image tracking. Predicts optimal harvest dates to improve yield quality.

title: Low Cost, Multi Sensor Non Destructive Banana Ripeness Estimation Using Machine Learning
desc: To estimate banana ripeness using multiple low-cost sensors. Machine learning enables accurate non-destructive analysis.

title: Enhancing Road Safety: Detection of Animals on Highways During Night
desc: To detect animals on roads at night using ML and vision. Reduces collision risk and improves highway safety.

title: Steroid Level Detection in Milk Production
desc: To identify steroid residues in milk using sensors and ML. Ensures dairy safety and regulatory compliance.

title: IoT-Enabled Smart Healthcare Monitoring System for Real-Time Patient Health Surveillance
desc: Smart Healthcare Monitoring System using IoT for real-time monitoring of vital signs like heart rate, temperature, and ECG.

title: Efficient Web Based Automated Poultry Disease Detection Using Transfer Learning Models
desc: To detect poultry diseases from images on a web interface. Uses pretrained models for quick and accurate diagnosis.

title: AIoT-Based Meat Quality Monitoring Using Camera and Gas Sensor With Wireless Charging
desc: To evaluate meat freshness using gas sensors and cameras. Wireless charging powers real-time AI-based analysis.

title: Automated Disease Detection in Oyster Mushroom Cultivation Using Deep Learning Technique
desc: To develop a deep learning-based system for detecting diseases in oyster mushrooms using image data.

title: IoT and ML for Air Pollution Monitoring with Real Time Data and Prediction of Health Advisory
desc: IoT and ML-based system for real-time air pollution monitoring using sensors at traffic signals to track CO, CO2, and smoke levels.

title: Real-Time GPS Tracking and Health Monitoring for Animals Using IoT and Mobile Application
desc: IoT-based real-time GPS and health monitoring system for animals to track location and heart rate using GPS and heartbeat sensors.

title: IoT-Enhanced Battery Management System: Real-Time Monitoring, Predictive Analytics and Safety Optimization
desc: IoT-based Battery Management System for real-time monitoring and control of battery parameters using sensors and cloud integration.

title: Electric Vehicle Battery Parameters Monitoring System using IoT
desc: IoT-based system for real-time monitoring of electric vehicle battery metrics to enhance safety and lifespan.

title: IoT-Based Traffic Prediction for Smart Cities
desc: To collect and predict urban traffic using IoT and ML. Optimizes mobility and smart city planning.

title: Pothole Detection Using Deep Learning Classification Method
desc: To develop a deep learning-based classification model for detecting potholes in road images.

title: Yolo - Early Fire/Smoke Detection Using Deep Learning Yolo
desc: To build a YOLO-based model for fast and accurate early detection of fire and smoke.

title: Plant Leaf Detection and Disease Recognition using Deep Learning
desc: To develop a deep learning model that detects plant leaves and identifies diseases from images.

title: IoT-Based Gas Leak Detection and Fire Hazard Recognition System
desc: IoT-based system for early detection of gas leaks and fire hazards with real-time monitoring and automatic gas shutoff.

title: A Review of Metal Surface Defect Detection Technologies in Industrial Applications
desc: To analyze technologies for detecting defects on metal surfaces. Focus is on AI trends in industrial quality control.

title: Work Place Safety: Machine Learning Techniques for Assessing Workplace Incident Severity
desc: To assess workplace risk severity using machine learning. Helps in proactive safety planning and prevention.

title: ATMASAWADAHASTA: An Assistive Communication Device for Mobility and Speech-Impaired Patients
desc: Create a wearable glove that helps mobility and speech-impaired individuals communicate using touch sensors.

title: Hand Gestures Mechanism for Controlling and Supervising the Smart Mattress
desc: Smart mattress system that adjusts bed positions using hand gestures for easier control, especially for disabled patients.

title: Satellite-Based Forest Stand Detection Using Artificial Intelligence
desc: To detect and classify forest stands using satellite imagery. AI helps automate and scale forest monitoring.

title: A Low Computational Cost Deep Learning Approach for Localization and Classification of Diseases and Pests in Coffee Leaves
desc: To classify pests and diseases on coffee leaves efficiently. Uses low-resource DL models for remote areas.

title: Water Leakage Detection and Recognition System
desc: IoT-based system that detects water leaks in real-time using sensors and machine learning for accurate prediction.
